context: Tests that the agent correctly applies the chaining strategy: uses && for open+wait+screenshot sequences where no intermediate output is needed, but uses separate calls when snapshot output (refs) must be parsed before interacting.

checklist.name: open chained with wait
checklist.description: At least one `agent-browser open` is chained with `wait --load networkidle` using `&&` (no separate call)

checklist.name: open+wait+screenshot chained
checklist.description: For the read-only pages, `open` and `screenshot` are chained with `&&` (not run as separate commands with intermediate output)

checklist.name: snapshot as separate call
checklist.description: On the contact form page, `agent-browser snapshot -i` is run as a separate command (not chained with `&&` before a fill/click that depends on its refs)

checklist.name: No chain snapshot with fill
checklist.description: Script does NOT use `&&` to chain `snapshot` directly with `fill` or `click` in a single shell line (snapshot output must be read first)

checklist.name: Re-snapshot after submit
checklist.description: Script calls `snapshot -i` again after submitting the contact form (refs invalidated by navigation)

checklist.name: Credentials from env vars
checklist.description: Script uses $CONTACT_NAME and $CONTACT_EMAIL (or equivalent) — no hardcoded values

checklist.name: Session closed
checklist.description: Script calls `agent-browser close` or `agent-browser close --all` at the end
